title: Intense Spicy Vietnamese Kippers Bun Bo Hue
description: A spicy and romantic Vietnamese dish featuring kippers, yuzu-cure, and raw-friendly ingredients, served in a fluffy bun bo hue form.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, cook the spicy pork sausage over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the lemongrass and lime leaves to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the fish sauce and chili sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to combine with the sausage and sauce.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the noodles and sausage into a bowl, then top with a kipper and a sprinkle of bean sprouts.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional lime leaves and lemongrass if desired.
Repeat the assembly process with the remaining ingredients.
Serve the dish hot, with additional chili sauce and fish sauce on the side for added flavor.
